calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-22-2018 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-22-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day, having been assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Lynn O'Malley Taylor. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Wendy C. Skillman, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Global Liberty Insurance Company of New York.
Albert Ho, an appraiser for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Mohammed Almasri, a witness for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant David M. Mejia.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Mayela Antoinette Hidalgo.
General Denial to the complaint was filed by defendant David M. Mejia on March 21, 2016.
Default was entered against defendant Mayela Antoinette Hidalgo on June 10, 2016.
Notice of Conditional Settlement was filed January 1, 2017.
Notive of Non-Complaince with Settlement Agreement was filed by plaintiff on November 3, 2017.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed and served on November 21, 2017.
DOES 1-10 dismissed today, January 22, 2018.

Exhibit 1: Driver's Statement by Mohammed Almasri dated February 10, 2015.............ID/EVID
Exhibit 2: Invoice from SCA Appraisal Company to Global Liberty Insurance Company of New York dated February 3, 2015................................................................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Global Liberty Insurance Company of New York, and against defendants David M. Mejia and Meyela Antoinette Hidalgo, as follows:

Damages - $7,278.20.
Pre-Judgment Interest - $1,518.65.
Costs - $565.00.
Total - $9,361.85.

Counsel STIPULATES to the return of Exhibits 1 & 2.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-21-2017 Set For Trial On Jan-22-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES: Wendy C. Shillman, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff. Counsel informed the Court of the lack of compliance with settlement and requested a Trial Setting. Court ordered case set for Court Trial on January 22, 2018 at 9:30 AM, in Department 610. Court to give notice. Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)
